featureName: E2E Migration: Puppeteer → Playwright + Shared POMs
description: Migrate all E2E tests from Puppeteer to Playwright, create shared POM layer between E2E and QA Bot, remove Puppeteer dependency. QA Bot autonomous explorer is kept (unique AI-powered exploration). Guided specs are merged with E2E.

userStories.title: Create shared POM layer + helpers
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single set of Playwright Page Object Models shared between E2E tests and QA Bot so that I maintain one POM per entity instead of two.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/shared/pages/ contains all 13 POMs (dashboard, building-wizard, lot-wizard, contract-wizard, intervention-wizard, intervention-detail, intervention-request, billing, mail-hub, notifications, reminder-wizard, reminder-detail, login)
tests/shared/helpers/selectors.ts merges both existing selector files
QA Bot guided specs updated to import from ../../shared/pages/
npx playwright test --config tests/qa-bot/playwright.config.ts still passes
userStories.notes: 13 POMs in tests/shared/pages/ (12 entities + index.ts barrel). Helpers: selectors.ts, constants.ts, types.ts. QA Bot POMs converted to thin re-export wrappers. All 8 guided specs updated. intervention-request.page.ts rewritten from Puppeteer to Playwright.

userStories.title: E2E Playwright config + auth setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a Playwright test config for E2E tests with storageState-based auth so that E2E tests run with the Playwright runner instead of Vitest+Puppeteer.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts with 4 projects (setup, gestionnaire, locataire, prestataire)
tests/e2e/setup/auth.setup.ts adapted from qa-bot auth setup
package.json: test:e2e uses npx playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts
npm run test:e2e runs Playwright (even with 0 specs initially)
userStories.notes: Playwright config with 4 projects + auth setup using Supabase GoTrue REST API. package.json: test:e2e, test:e2e:preview, test:e2e:headed, test:e2e:debug. Legacy Puppeteer kept as test:e2e:legacy temporarily.

userStories.title: Rewrite unique Puppeteer tests as Playwright specs
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the 4 Puppeteer-only E2E tests rewritten in Playwright so that all regression coverage is preserved without Puppeteer.
acceptanceCriteria: All specs use Playwright auto-wait, locators, and web-first assertions (no waitForSelector, evaluate)
All specs import POMs from tests/shared/pages/
userStories.notes: 4 specs created: intervention-locataire.locataire.spec.ts, intervention-workflow.spec.ts, stripe-checkout.spec.ts, stripe-readonly.spec.ts. All use Playwright locators (getByRole, getByText), web-first assertions, test.skip() for env-gated tests. DB polling preserved for async server actions.

userStories.title: Merge overlapping Puppeteer tests into QA Bot specs
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unique assertions from overlapping Puppeteer tests merged into QA Bot guided specs so that no test coverage is lost.
acceptanceCriteria: intervention-gestionnaire.e2e.ts unique scenarios merged into intervention-lifecycle.spec.ts
stripe/billing-ui.e2e.ts unique scenarios merged into billing-settings.spec.ts
No duplicate test coverage between E2E and QA Bot
npx playwright test --config tests/qa-bot/playwright.config.ts still passes
userStories.notes: intervention-gestionnaire fully covered by intervention-lifecycle.spec.ts (wizard creation + full lifecycle). Added pricing cards test to billing-settings.spec.ts. Trial banner and onboarding checklist are soft assertions (state-dependent) — not worth porting.

userStories.title: Cleanup Puppeteer infrastructure
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all Puppeteer-specific code and dependencies removed so that the codebase has a single browser automation framework.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run test:e2e runs Playwright successfully
userStories.notes: Deleted 20+ Puppeteer files. Uninstalled puppeteer dependency. Removed legacy test:e2e:legacy script. E2E dir now: playwright.config.ts + setup/ + specs/ only.

userStories.title: Update documentation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want CLAUDE.md and memory updated to reflect the new test architecture so that future sessions use the correct commands and patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: CLAUDE.md Development Commands section updated (test:e2e → Playwright)
userStories.notes: CLAUDE.md: test:e2e now Playwright, added test:e2e:debug. Memory: removed Puppeteer-specific patterns, updated framework info and project state.
